name: Peanut- Butter Crisscrosses
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and granulated sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla to the mixture. Beat until well combined.
3. Stir in the peanut butter until incorporated.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Mix until just combined.
6. Roll the dough into small balls (about 1/2 teaspoon rounded).
7. Place the balls on a non-stick cookie sheet.
8. Press each ball with the flat side of a floured fork to create crisscross patterns.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Note: The original recipe had an error in the ingredient list, so 1/2 cup margarine and 1/2 cup sugar have been removed.
